rootCause: A static inline import for the offline toast kept resolving to /src/scripts/offlineToast.js during SSR builds, so the 404 chunk still referenced the source path even after relocating the asset to public/.
resolution: Switched Layout.astro to dynamically import the public /scripts/offlineToast.js bundle with a Vite-ignore hint, preventing bundling from rewriting the URL back to /src and keeping built assets free of source-only paths.
